example_tasks: PickCube, StackCube, PegInsertionSide, PlugCharger — the rigid-body grasp/place core.
Multi-fingered hands (Allegro / ShadowHand) for in-hand reorientation & fine control.
Plasticine, fluids & deformable objects via MPM-style soft-body physics.
Fetch-style arm-on-base opening cabinets, drawers & doors across a room.
Quadruped (Unitree Go2, ANYmal-C) & humanoid navigation to goal locations.
Long-horizon tasks in photorealistic, artist-designed indoor scenes (ReplicaCAD / AI2-THOR-style).
Unitree H1 / G1 and dual-arm embodiments for cooperative two-hand tasks.
Two or more robots in one scene performing collaborative manipulation.
Trajectory-following with a tool — tracing curves, wiping/cleaning surfaces.
Tasks fusing visual input with simulated tactile sensing.
CartPole / pendulum-style benchmark control problems for fast iteration.
Real-world digital twins for sim-to-real evaluation (SIMPLER-style cube picking).
